no_action_called.fix: Check action instructions, verify trigger conditions match utterance patterns

wrong_action.fix: Clarify action descriptions, add disambiguation in instructions

wrong_topic.fix: Adjust topic scope instructions, add boundary definitions

incomplete_response.fix: Add/update knowledge articles, verify article indexing

hallucination.root_cause: No grounding match, made up answer
hallucination.fix: Add guardrails, improve knowledge coverage, tighten instructions

latency_fail.fix: Optimize action chain, reduce knowledge scope
